name: snitch-service
description: Timed macOS narration service with queued speech, pauses, and cue durations
author: Kris

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external kokoro-js --external @huggingface/transformers && swiftc ./src/pcm-player.swift -o ./dist/snitch-pcm-player
